title: Fix lichen_coap_deaddrop_register stub and init order
description: Implement lichen_coap_deaddrop_register per init graph: call oscore_init(). Replace raw memcpy in coap_dtn.c with senml_encode/decode for SenML/DTN setup. Update coap_dtn.c, coap_server.h if needed, Kconfig. Ensure no comments. Run tests after.
close_reason: Implemented lichen_coap_deaddrop_register with oscore_init check, full SenML coap_respond+deaddrop_get handler mimicking coap_location.c style (no comments), moved resource to avoid duplicate, 3 codereview passes (P1 fixed+closed, P2/P3 addressed with no remaining P0/P1), Zephyr native_sim coap tests build+pass
